title: huperzia rigida
intro: Huperzia rigida, also known as a forked lycopod, is a species of club moss in the family Huperziaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiviral and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been attributed to the presence of huperzine A. The health benefits of Huperzia rigida include its potential to improve cognitive function, boost memory, and support neuroprotection. Huperzine A is often extracted from the plant and used in herbal preparations, such as capsules and tablets, to support brain health and potentially treat conditions like Alzheimer's disease.
